title: Coldplay Music of The Spheres Live Broadcast from Buenos Aires
original_title: Coldplay: Music of the Spheres - Live Broadcast from Buenos Aires
overview: Experience the stunning spectacle of Coldplay’s record-breaking Music Of The Spheres world tour at your local cinema with this spectacular worldwide live broadcast of the band’s sold out concert at Buenos Aires’ River Plate stadium directly from Argentina in a stadium bursting with lights, lasers, fireworks and LED wristbands - all of which combine to make Coldplay’s concerts such a joyful and life-affirming experience.
